rationale: This is the bounded follow-up requested by the latest workflow proposal: a matched cache-friendly control run against the accepted 2048 KB, 128-byte-stride measurement. It stays within the real CUDA memory-hierarchy probe family, preserves deterministic controls, uses identical launch parameters for direct comparison, and fits the 120-second round budget.
topic: Run a matched cache-friendly control for the latest 2048 KB strided CUDA memory probe to test whether the observed bandwidth is due to memory-hierarchy locality rather than fixed launch configuration.
